mapper.update:
update bill
category_id = #{dto.categoryId},
amount = #{dto.amount},
remark = #{dto.remark},
record_time = #{dto.recordTime},
where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select id, name, type, icon, sort from system_category where id = #{categoryId}
select id, user_id, category_id, budget_cycle, budget_amount, create_time, update_time, is_deleted from budget_config where user_id = #{userId} and category_id = #{categoryId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into bill ( user_id, category_id, amount, type, remark, record_time, is_ai_generated, is_deleted ) values ( #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{amount}, #{type}, #{remark}, #{recordTime}, #{isAiGenerated}, #{isDeleted} )
